label: Timeout Scenario — simulates NLIR 6s timeout (triggers fallback)
notes: Set MOCK_SCENARIO=timeout in feed_flags.json to activate. Adapter sleeps 6s then raises FeedTimeoutError. Fallback to OfflineRasterAdapter should fire. Report must complete with fallback_used=true.

label: HTTP 500 Scenario — simulates registry server error
notes: Simulates NLIR returning 500. Fallback should fire. fallback_used=true in feed_meta.

label: Schema Mismatch Scenario — simulates malformed registry response
notes: Simulates NLIR returning unexpected field names. Adapter must reject payload, fallback to offline, log SCHEMA_MISMATCH, and continue.

label: Partial Data Scenario — simulates registry returning incomplete record
notes: Registry returns title_type but omits title_status and acquisition_flag. Adapter accepts what came, nulls the rest, sets fallback_used=true.

label: No Record Scenario — parcel not found in registry
notes: No matching parcel in registry. All title fields return null. source_verified=false. Report continues with [UNVERIFIED] labels.
